hero.title: Never Miss a License Renewal
hero.subtitle: Track contractor licenses, permits, and certifications across your entire organization. Get alerts before they expire.

testimonials.title: Loved by Contractors Everywhere
testimonials.subtitle: See what our customers have to say about LicenseVault.

items.name: Sarah Mitchell
items.quote: LicenseVault has completely transformed how we manage our licenses. We used to have spreadsheets everywhere — now everything is in one place with automatic alerts.

items.name: James Rodriguez
items.quote: The AI compliance assistant is a game-changer. It answered our licensing questions instantly and saved us from a costly compliance gap.

items.name: Emily Chen
items.quote: Managing certifications for 200+ employees was a nightmare. LicenseVault made it effortless. The team management features are exactly what we needed.

features.title: Everything You Need to Stay Compliant
features.subtitle: LicenseVault keeps your team licensed, your projects on track, and your business audit-ready.

track.title: Track Every License
track.description: Monitor state licenses, city permits, employee certifications, insurance policies, and bonds — all in one place.

alerts.title: Smart Expiration Alerts
alerts.description: Get notified 60, 30, and 5 days before any license expires. Never be caught off guard again.

ai.title: AI-Powered Compliance
ai.description: Ask our AI assistant about licensing requirements, scan documents, and get compliance recommendations.

team.title: Team Management
team.description: Invite team members, assign roles, and ensure everyone's credentials are up to date.

import.title: Bulk CSV Import
import.description: Import your entire license portfolio in seconds with our smart CSV parser and validation.

compliance.title: Compliance Portal
compliance.description: Share your compliance status publicly with clients and partners through secure share links.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get compliant in three simple steps — no complicated setup required.

step1.title: Track
step1.description: Add all your licenses, permits, and certifications in one place. Import from CSV or enter manually.

step2.title: Alert
step2.description: Receive smart notifications 60, 30, and 5 days before any license expires via email and in-app.

step3.title: Comply
step3.description: Renew on time, share compliance status with clients, and stay audit-ready at all times.

items.q: What types of licenses can I track?
items.a: You can track state contractor licenses, city permits, employee certifications, insurance policies, bonds, and any other credential with an expiration date.
You configure which alert windows matter to you (60, 30, or 5 days before expiry). We send both in-app notifications and email alerts.

items.q: Can I share compliance status with clients?
items.a: Yes! Create a public compliance share link that shows your active licenses and credentials without exposing sensitive details.

items.q: What does the AI assistant do?
items.a: Our AI assistant answers questions about licensing requirements, helps scan documents to extract license details, and provides compliance recommendations.

footer.description: The trusted platform for contractor license compliance management.

aiChat.title: AI Compliance Assistant
aiChat.subtitle: Ask questions about licensing requirements, compliance, and more.
aiChat.welcome: Hello! I'm your AI compliance assistant. I can help answer questions about contractor licensing requirements, renewal processes, and compliance best practices. How can I help you today?
aiChat.welcomeTitle: How can I help you today?
aiChat.error: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
aiChat.suggestion0: What licenses do I need for electrical work in California?
aiChat.suggestion1: How do I renew an expired license?
aiChat.suggestion2: What are the penalties for operating with an expired license?
aiChat.clearChatConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the chat history?
aiChat.noMessages: Start a conversation with your AI compliance assistant
aiChat.noMessagesDesc: Ask about license requirements, renewal processes, or compliance best practices
aiChat.prompt3: What's the renewal process for licenses?
aiChat.prompt5: What are the penalties for expired licenses?
aiChat.prompt6: Best practices for tracking multiple state licenses
aiChat.biggestRisks: What are my biggest compliance risks right now?
aiChat.ceHoursNeeded: How many CE hours do I need to complete?
aiChat.renewalRequirements: What are the requirements for my next renewal?
aiChat.multiStateCompliance: Am I compliant in all my states?
aiChat.whatIfRenewal: What would happen if I don't renew my expiring license?

documentScanner.title: Document Scanner
documentScanner.description: AI-powered document scanning for automatic data extraction from COIs, licenses, and bonds
documentScanner.uploadArea: Drag & drop your document here or click to upload
documentScanner.uploadHint: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, PDF up to 10MB
documentScanner.tip1: Use high-resolution images for better accuracy. Phone camera photos work great.
documentScanner.tip2: Ensure the document is fully visible and not cropped. All four corners should be in frame.
documentScanner.tip3: Good lighting helps the AI read text more accurately. Avoid shadows and glare.
documentScanner.tip4: Select the document type manually if auto-detect gives low confidence results.
documentScanner.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please upload JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or PDF.
documentScanner.unknownDocumentType: Could not determine document type. Try selecting the type manually.
